Joe Root Reaches 22,000 Runs During Ashes 2025

Dec 28, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Joe Root’s 22,000-Run Landmark Defines Ashes 2025

Joe Root etched his name deeper into cricket history by surpassing 22,000 international runs at the MCG, standing out amid England’s mixed Ashes 2025 campaign.
